\tzpentry{ID4204}{Spectral Gap Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4204 introduces Spectral Gap Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Delta\phi_{\text{GW}} = \frac{2\pi n_{\text{wind}}}{c} \int_{\text{path}} B_{\text{solar}} \cdot dl \sim 10^{-6} \text{ rad} \end{equation}
